description: Fix test_02 branch training parameters: reset LR, increase data volume, improve PK reliability

stages.description: Fixed parameters: LR=0.001, sh_samples=50000, pk_games=100, symmetric visits

tr_lr.reason: Reset LR to training-knowledge recommended range [0.001, 0.002]. Previous LR was below FP16 NaN threshold (0.00025).

sh_samples.reason: Increase from 2% to 100% of recommended minimum. 1000 rows is insufficient for effective learning.

pk_games.reason: Increase from ±15% to ±8% confidence interval. 20 games produces unreliable winrate estimates.

pk_visits_b.reason: Symmetric visits eliminate color bias. Previous 64/64 was already symmetric, but increasing to 128 improves evaluation quality.

pk_visits_w.reason: Symmetric visits eliminate color bias. Previous 64/64 was already symmetric, but increasing to 128 improves evaluation quality.

tr_batch.reason: Increase batch size for better GPU utilization. GTX 1650 Ti can safely handle batch=64 with b10c128.

sf_games.reason: Increase selfplay games for more training data per round. Recommended range: 500-1500.

sf_visits.reason: Increase MCTS visits for better search quality. Recommended range: 96-128.

pk_threshold.reason: Higher threshold prevents marginal promotions. v4-stabilize used 0.58 successfully.

expected_outcomes.round_1: LR reset should show immediate improvement in training stability. Expect winrate > 0.55 if model capacity exists.
expected_outcomes.round_2_3: With proper data volume (50000 rows), model should converge faster. Monitor for plateau detection.
expected_outcomes.round_4_5: If LR decays again, DecisionEngine will apply 0.5x multiplier. Watch for NaN at low LR.
expected_outcomes.risk: LR=0.001 may be too high after 5 rounds of decay. If NaN occurs, DecisionEngine will auto-reduce.

monitoring_checkpoints: Check training log for NaN occurrences after each round
Verify PK is actually running (check pk_result_*.json timestamps)
Monitor winrate trend: should be > 0.55 for promotion
Check color bias: Black/White wins should be ~50/50
